authority: planned newsroom pose catalog; current equivalence is recorded separately per engine

poses.newsroom_purpose: Express anchor neutral front without changing editorial content, timing authority, or source state.
poses.geometry_requirement: reuse validated geometry and authored anchors
poses.silhouette: Readable at 320x180 as anchor neutral front; hands, head line, staff, and wings must not merge ambiguously.
poses.head_direction: follows gaze with a maximum bounded offset; returns to camera on restoration
poses.mouth_compatibility: provider-timed speech compatible; must close on stop or replacement
poses.robe_behavior: secondary settle follows root; no independent root drift or desk penetration
poses.hat_behavior: tip secondary motion is bounded and suppressed for serious/reduced-motion states
poses.beard_behavior: one-tick-delayed bounded settle; never obscures mouth shape
poses.story_sensitivity_limit: general editorial use; clamp to 0.35 for high-sensitivity stories
poses.interruption: breaking/correction overrides immediately or at the next declared safe marker; speech generation replacement closes mouth first
poses.restoration: restore the last valid semantic family, mark, gaze, and speech generation only if still current; otherwise settle to anchor neutral
poses.desktop_safe_bounds: actor bounds inside 6%-94% x and 5%-96% y; staff and wings included
poses.mobile_safe_bounds: safe center 22%-78% x; use compact wings and suppress lateral props before scaling below legibility
poses.closeup_compatibility: allowed only if face, hands, and required graphic remain readable
poses.reduced_motion_fallback: direct 100-160 ms settle to semantic end pose; no repeated secondary motion

poses.closeup_compatibility: allowed only if face, hands, and required graphic remain readable
poses.reduced_motion_fallback: static end pose plus one opacity/color change; no pulse, puff, spin, or repeated wing motion

poses.newsroom_purpose: Express wings resting without changing editorial content, timing authority, or source state.
poses.geometry_requirement: author or compose cell geometry with explicit region, anchor, contact, mask, and bounds metadata
poses.silhouette: Readable at 320x180 as wings resting; hands, head line, staff, and wings must not merge ambiguously.
poses.head_direction: follows gaze with a maximum bounded offset; returns to camera on restoration
poses.mouth_compatibility: provider-timed speech compatible; must close on stop or replacement
poses.robe_behavior: secondary settle follows root; no independent root drift or desk penetration
poses.hat_behavior: tip secondary motion is bounded and suppressed for serious/reduced-motion states
poses.beard_behavior: one-tick-delayed bounded settle; never obscures mouth shape
poses.story_sensitivity_limit: general editorial use; clamp to 0.35 for high-sensitivity stories
poses.interruption: breaking/correction overrides immediately or at the next declared safe marker; speech generation replacement closes mouth first
poses.restoration: restore the last valid semantic family, mark, gaze, and speech generation only if still current; otherwise settle to anchor neutral
